description: The terminal scanner for AI-agent readiness: every check the web tool runs, plus copy-paste fixes, CI gating, scan history, and a local store the web UI has no answer for.

tools.name: scan_run
tools.description: Scan a URL; returns readiness level (0-5), per-check results across 5 categories, and prioritized fix advice for reaching the next level. Required: url.

params.name: url
params.description: The website URL to scan, e.g. https://example.com
